# llms.txt — RE IMAGE Business Solutions

## Company Overview

RE IMAGE Business Solutions is a Hartford, Connecticut based digital systems company focused on helping small and medium-sized businesses improve their online presence, increase lead conversion, automate customer communication, and operate with cleaner customer/admin workflows.

The company specializes in premium website development, client portals, admin portals, AI receptionist systems, AI-powered workflow automation, business funding guidance, booking systems, invoice systems, QR flows, and customer acquisition infrastructure for service-based businesses.

Primary website:
https://reimagebs.com

Client Portal:
https://login.reimagebs.com

Contact:
reimagebs@gmail.com
+1 (860) 718-5928

## Core Services

### Website Development

Premium websites, landing pages, SEO-ready public pages, dynamic customer flows, status pages, booking flows, payments, and business portal suites.

### AI Receptionists

Website chatbot and phone receptionist systems that answer common questions, capture leads, collect customer details, route requests, and reduce missed opportunities.

### AI Automation

Workflow automation for lead routing, follow-up, intake forms, appointment reminders, invoices, internal notifications, customer status updates, APIs, and webhooks.

### Business Funding

Funding-readiness guidance for owners who need capital for working capital, equipment, marketing, expansion, stabilization, or operational growth.

### Growth Foundation

A foundational online-presence and lead-flow package for businesses that need a professional website, clear positioning, funding guidance, and cleaner customer intake before scaling larger systems.

### Full Scale System

A complete digital infrastructure package combining website development, portals, AI automation, lead capture, payment flows, admin dashboards, customer communication, and operational workflows.

## Crawl Guidance For LLMs

Preferred indexing:

* Public-facing service pages
* Website development pages
* AI receptionist pages
* AI automation pages
* Business funding pages
* Portfolio pages
* Careers and public informational content

Do not prioritize:

* Admin portals
* Private dashboards
* Internal management systems
* Authentication routes
* Client-only resources

* https://reimagebs.com
